Localization.Description: Suspicious logon to Microsoft SQL Server. Authentication data differ from the collected profile.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to a new instance of Microsoft SQL Server on host {event_src.host}. The instance is missing from the collected profile.

User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} used new logon type {logon_type} ({datafield6}) to log in to Microsoft SQL Server on host {event_src.host}. The logon type is missing from the collected profile.
New user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to Microsoft SQL Server on host {event_src.host}. The user is missing from the collected profile.
User {subject.account.name} from new host {src.host} logged in to Microsoft SQL Server on host {event_src.host}. The address is missing from the collected profile.
